probe_query: Parent post: When do I mention something about not living near the job?. Topic: Boss, Manager, Week, Fired, Days. Comment viewpoint: They’ll probably confirm in the phone screen that you’re prepared to come in 3x/week. Don’t lie.

Parent post: Is it still possible to appeal me being put on a no rehire list after leaving with no notice?. Topic: Boss, Manager, Week, Fired, Days. Comment viewpoint: The HR person literally told you the answer to this question. Why would we tell you anything different? You can email and try to explain. But they told you it’s not happening.

Parent post: Do Most Of Gen Z Want Office Jobs?. Topic: Market, Layoffs, Economy, 000, Unemployment. Comment viewpoint: I believe that in this day and age, Gen Z, but also any Gen want a livable wage that not in the office 5 days a week. Personally, I’d be down for

Parent post: What’s some high paying jobs?. Topic: Looking, Experience, Degree, Help, College. Comment viewpoint: Okay well what industries are you interested in? Every high paying job requires an insane amount of dedication and commitment to the industry, you straight up won’t succeed if you’re only in

Parent post: Was not selected during final round of interviews (6 candidates). Job relisted 2 months later. Would you reapply?. Topic: Interview, Offer, Email, Week, Recruiter. Comment viewpoint: Honestly I would reach out to my contact at the company from the interview process and ask if there is another opportunity for the position as you're still interested.
Parent post: mouse infested workplace. Topic: Outlier / Uncategorised. Comment viewpoint: Take pictures as evidence and submit an anonymous tip to OSHA and the health department
